title: hypericum perfoliatum var. annulatum
intro: Hypericum perfoliatum var. annulatum, also known as the marsh St. John's wort, is a perennial plant native to North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, due to the presence of hypericin and hyperforin. The health benefits of Hypericum perfoliatum var. annulatum include its use in treating anxiety and depression, as well as its potential to reduce pain and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
